flags: Reconciles to Jobber: 26 unscheduled = 19 staged + 6 held + 1 David-owned (excluded). Pull COMPLETE — 26 of 26 (paginated, count-assert PASS); no PULL-SHORT.

⚠ DATA-INTEGRITY FIX (this run): Jobber's `scheduledItems` API HIDES client-confirmed assessments — Roger Cook (Mon 6/29 8:00, confirmed) did NOT appear there. The frozen set is now pulled from `requests(status: upcoming)`, which INCLUDES confirmed assessments, so Roger is correctly LOCKED at Mon 8:00. Never enumerate the frozen set from scheduledItems alone.

Mon 6/29 FROZEN — 7 scheduled assessments: Roger Cook 8:00 (CONFIRMED ✓, assigned David = green), then Fredrickson 9:30 → Carol Peterson 1:15 (6 NOT yet confirmed, assigned Joseph = purple). Matches the Jobber calendar exactly.

Mon 6/29 8:45 is OPEN — Jackie Foster removed at her request (bid completed + archived 6/26). Left OPEN on purpose: committed appointments must STICK, and a freed slot should be backfilled only with a stop that geographically fits that slot in the frozen route — never by moving a scheduled client. Smart freed-slot backfill isn't built yet (new build item), so nothing was dropped into 8:45 this run.

Changes since the 6/26 04:23 sweep: Morty Jenkins (stump grinding, Richmond) — assessment completed + request CONVERTED 6/26 → off board. Jackie Foster — completed + archived 6/26 → off board + freed Mon 8:45. Net: unscheduled 27→26; frozen Mon 8→7.

⚠ Wed 7/1 carries BOTH large/complex bids — Todd Horman (~10 trees) and Carolyn St-Onge (removal + 2 maples + 3 aspens) — on a FULL 8-stop day. Two 60–90 min bids will likely push past the 2 PM cap; widen both or move one to a North day with room (Mon 7/6 has only 3 stops).

Pin QA (map-parity) CLEAN — 0 divergence >75 m across all 19 routable stops (max ~21 m, Todd Horman). All geoStatus=FOUND. Terri Jensen & Bill Chandler matched the Jobber FOUND pin (cache street-name variants: '590 Cherry Ridge' vs cached '590 North Cherry Ridge'; '24 Spring Creek Pkwy' vs cached '24 West Spring Creek Pkwy').

Cache-first geocoding: 17/19 routable stops hit the cache; 2 used the Jobber FOUND pin. Added 9 addresses to the cache (5 far-held + Cordell + Penny + the 2 variants), source jobber-found-2026-06-26 → cache now 37 entries. TomTom MCP NOT connected this run; routing ran fully on cache + Jobber FOUND pins (addresses don't move) — nothing held for geocoding.

Per-day miles/drive/homeETA are great-circle ESTIMATES (×1.25 road factor) — TomTom offline, no live drive-times. Pool changed since 04:23 (Morty converted; Jackie removed) so prior TomTom numbers were NOT carried. Last appointment ≤ 1:15 every day (ends ≤ 2 PM) by the 8-slot cap.
